calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn For An Order To Amend Name Of Deft And Judgment Debtor So As To Make The Judgment Conform To Law And Justice
Off Calendar Oct-30-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF THE NATIONAL COLECTION AGENCY INC.'s Motion For An Order To Amend Name Of Defendant And Judgment Debtor So As To Make The Judgment Conform To Law And Justice is Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR # 12998 =(302/MJM)
